display_information.name: REplay Feedback
display_information.description: Posts bug reports and feature requests submitted via replay.cyburdine.com to Slack.
display_information.long_description: Receives webhook calls from the REplay feedback Cloudflare Worker whenever someone submits a bug report or feature request through the marketing site. Each Slack notification links to the auto-created GitHub issue on cyburdine/REplay and includes the submitter's screenshot when present. No interactivity, no slash commands, outbound webhooks only.
